# WideQuran Embed Widget

> Embeddable WideQuran widgets for any website. Zero dependencies, Shadow DOM isolation, 4 themes (light/dark/sepia/auto).

## Quick Start

Add to any HTML page:
- Script: <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/widequran-embed@1/dist/embed.min.js"></script>

## Links

- Main site: https://widequran.com
- Widget docs: https://widget.widequran.com
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/widequran-embed
- GitHub: https://github.com/dobestan/widequran-embed
- API: https://widequran.com/developers/

## WideHoly Widget Family

- [WideHoly Widget](https://widget.wideholy.com)
- [WideBible Widget](https://widget.widebible.com)
- [WideTorah Widget](https://widget.widetorah.com)
- [WideGita Widget](https://widget.widegita.com)
- [WideSutra Widget](https://widget.widesutra.com)

## Part of FYIPedia

Open-source developer tools ecosystem — https://fyipedia.com
